Announcement.title: Announcement
Announcement.description: A global broadcast message displayed to all users.

senderName.description: The name of the person sending the announcement.

text.description: The message content of the announcement.

imageUrl.description: Optional image URL to display with the announcement.

isVerified.description: Whether the sender should display a verification badge.

active.description: Whether this announcement is currently active.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the announcement was created.
